race.description: Maria River Cattle Co Armidale Showcase Cup
race.comment: Competitive contest with plenty of chances. HIBIKI HARMONY (11) continued the good form she displayed last prep when returned for a tough on-pace second over 1600m at Tamworth in the Quirindi Cup. Gets her chance from the draw with a winning apprentice jumping back aboard. KAIHOKO (14) progressive gelding who produced a sharp set of closing splits when coming from near last on the turn to run a narrow second over 1200m at Port Macquarie in the MNC Champs. Ready for the 1400m and set to peak. Hard to hold out. IRON MAN (1) has gone to a new level for the Osland yard with the three wins from his last five starts. Scored a determined head win over 1400m at Eagle Farm in BM85 class. Low draw keeps him in the mix with the 63kg. UZZIAH (3) tough on-pace gelding who gets up to his right distance range. Comes out of a solid race after finishing fourth over 1300m at Rosehill in BM78 grade. Can cruise across from the draw and give a ton of cheek.
